description: Tests for web search capability - system should search when uncertain, then admit if still unknown
_comment: These tests verify that BrachyBot uses web search appropriately. The system should: 1) Answer from knowledge if certain, 2) Search web if uncertain, 3) Admit ignorance if search fails. Search behavior should be transparent to the user.

cases.input: How many brachytherapy procedures were performed at Memorial Sloan Kettering in 2024?
cases._comment: System should attempt to search for this institutional data. After search fails, should admit it doesn't have access to specific hospital data.

cases.input: How many patients did you treat last month?
cases._comment: System should clarify it's an AI, not a healthcare provider. Should NOT search.
